title: Local predictive fixed point
reason: Analytic fixed-point sanity check belonged to the abandoned physical-low-rank framing

title: Feedback dimension and geometry sweep
reason: Original synthetic result remains reproducible but low feedback dimension was incorrectly interpreted as low physical connection rank

title: Oracle context E/I gate
reason: Oracle access to true context cannot establish hidden-context inference

title: Supervised Hebbian context gate
reason: Supervised context labels and the legacy gate were superseded by leakage-safe hidden-HMM inference

title: Rate-matched phase gate
reason: The registered rate-matched phase effect was absent so the independent phase-gate proposal was rejected

title: Public sequence-memory shared dynamics
reason: Data coverage and validation were insufficient for the current multi-session shared-model claim

title: IBL context-switch pilot
reason: The early restricted-session protocol was superseded by leakage-safe behavior and later neural protocols

title: Paired mechanism-identifiability audit
reason: Useful P0 precursor but the active theory now separates credit tangent physical update rank and effective control

title: Rank-stage and credit-tangent validation
reason: Current foundation for high-rank physical E/I updates with low-dimensional credit assignment

title: Hidden-HMM belief gate
reason: Leakage-safe learned gates do not access true context and include causal interventions

title: Belief-to-Dale-E/I bridge
reason: Establishes a bounded frozen-receiver bridge while Exp21 provides the stronger full-trajectory audit

title: IBL behavior belief benchmark
reason: Real behavior supports hidden-block inference but does not yet validate shared neural dynamics

title: Structured routing interface
reason: Interface precursor without a formal result package and superseded by task-specific reasoning audits

title: ARC maze and Sudoku structured reasoning
reason: Exploratory proposal-selection panels did not support the general reasoning claim

title: IBL multi-session neural audit
reason: The earlier neural comparison did not establish the current hierarchical shared-model endpoint

title: Task-specialized ARC and Sudoku adapters
reason: Engineering adapter study failed its formal advantage gates and is outside the active mechanism theory

title: Tiny recursive Sudoku baseline
reason: The retry did not show a reliable recursive-state advantage and the route was abandoned

title: Tiny recursive calibration
reason: Calibration-only exploratory stage did not yield confirmatory evidence

title: ARC recursive canary baseline
reason: Small canaries were not an official large-scale HRM or TRM reproduction and were not promoted

title: Belief-controlled E/I checkpoint audit
reason: Narrow checkpoint evidence was superseded by the identifiable full-trajectory Exp21 protocol

title: IBL belief-conditioned neural prediction
reason: Negative or incomplete neural validation is retained but the protocol was superseded by Exp25

title: Belief-controlled high-rank E/I trajectories
reason: Current bounded evidence for low-dimensional effective control closure and normal recovery on a frozen high-rank receiver

title: Off-policy local gain-axis proposals
reason: Off-policy frozen-trajectory proposal audit was superseded by the closed-loop test

title: Closed-loop local population-gain controller
reason: The tested local rule axis and budget failed held-out behavior despite positive gradient alignment and was abandoned

title: Factorized actuator capability benchmark
reason: Current oracle capability evidence that task demand reverses the useful control family

title: CompositionalTasks shared belief dynamics
reason: Active fail-closed real-data endpoint remains open because the canonical neural bundle is unavailable

title: Continuous actuator demand phase diagram
reason: Current preregistered 30-seed evidence for task-to-actuator matching geometry

title: Descriptor actuator selector development panel
reason: Positive development result was superseded by the independent one-shot Exp29 confirmation

title: Independent selector sensitivity and source amendment
reason: The original source ceiling was invalid and the amended analysis remained permanently non-confirmatory

title: Independent descriptor-selector confirmation
reason: Current one-shot held-out evidence for low-dimensional actuator-family selection

title: Associative actuator trend panel
reason: Five-seed positive control was exploratory and superseded by the formal hidden-reliability test

title: Hidden-reliability reward-only selector
reason: Current 30-seed evidence that scalar executed reward can select between two fixed motifs within reset blocks

title: Persistent sparse-feedback controller
reason: Main continuous-HMM controller claim is supported while the registered iso-lambda timescale structure remains inconclusive

title: ORBIT reward-only streaming selector
reason: Substantial actuator headroom was present but the reward-only selector underperformed fixed and credit-shuffled controls on held-out users

title: ORBIT causal consensus belief gate
reason: Corrected 17-user task and causal-state effects support; strict untouched-first-look confirmation is inconclusive after the invalid 15-user coverage attempt and no efficiency or SOTA claim is made
